Interface RequestNotificationService

All Known Implementing Classes:
RequestNotificationServiceImpl
public interface RequestNotificationService
Dispatches notifications to relevant parties when the status of a request changes. Implementations may send notifications via email, in-app messaging, or other channels.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<NotificationRecord>
    getByStaff(Staff staff)
    Returns all notifications dispatched by the given staff member.
    List<NotificationRecord>
    getByTarget(String targetId)
    Returns all notifications associated with the given target identifier.
    List<NotificationRecord>
    listAll()
    Returns all notifications that have been dispatched.
    void
    notifyAdoptionStatusChange(AdoptionRequest request)
    Sends a notification to the adopter when the status of their adoption request changes.
    void
    notifyTransferStatusChange(TransferRequest request)
    Sends a notification to relevant shelter staff when a transfer request status changes.
    List<NotificationRecord>
    searchByAction(String keyword)
    Returns all notifications whose action description contains the given keyword.

  • Method Details

    • notifyAdoptionStatusChange

      void notifyAdoptionStatusChange(AdoptionRequest request)
      Sends a notification to the adopter when the status of their adoption request changes. Throws an exception if the request or its associated adopter is null.
      Parameters:
      request - the adoption request whose status has changed

    • notifyTransferStatusChange

      void notifyTransferStatusChange(TransferRequest request)
      Sends a notification to relevant shelter staff when a transfer request status changes. Throws an exception if the request or its associated shelters are null.
      Parameters:
      request - the transfer request whose status has changed

    • listAll

      List<NotificationRecord> listAll()
      Returns all notifications that have been dispatched. Returns an empty list if no notifications have been sent.
      Returns:
      a list of all notification records

    • getByStaff

      List<NotificationRecord> getByStaff(Staff staff)
      Returns all notifications dispatched by the given staff member. Returns an empty list if the staff member has sent no notifications.
      Parameters:
      staff - the staff member to query
      Returns:
      a list of notification records sent by the staff member

    • getByTarget

      List<NotificationRecord> getByTarget(String targetId)
      Returns all notifications associated with the given target identifier. Returns an empty list if no notifications match the target.
      Parameters:
      targetId - the identifier of the target object
      Returns:
      a list of notification records for the target

    • searchByAction

      List<NotificationRecord> searchByAction(String keyword)
      Returns all notifications whose action description contains the given keyword. Returns an empty list if no notifications match the keyword.
      Parameters:
      keyword - the string to search for in action descriptions
      Returns:
      a list of matching notification records
